# SLT Design System

> Sound Labbit Technology shared design system. DTCG tokens, 7-layer docs, AI-readable.
> Version: 0.4.5

## Structure (7 Layers)

- L0 Principles: docs/L0-principles.md
- L1 Foundations: design-tokens/, docs/L1-foundations/
- L2 Components: design-tokens/components.json, docs/L2-components/README.md
- L3 Patterns: docs/L3-patterns.md
- L4 Content: docs/L4-content.md
- L5 Quality: docs/L5-quality.md
- L6 Governance: docs/L6-governance.md, docs/L6-harness-and-loops.md, docs/ROADMAP.md, CLAUDE.md

## Browse docs

- Docs site (Astro): npm run docs:dev → http://localhost:4321 (local only for now; no public URL — see site/README.md)
- Storybook: npm run storybook → http://localhost:6006
- Markdown source of truth: docs/

## UI Components (@soundlabbit/design-system/ui)

P0: Button, Input, Textarea, Card, Dialog, Badge, Checkbox, Radio, Select, Switch, Heading, Divider, NoticeBlock
P1: BrandBackground, WaveBackground, GridBackground, Toast, SiteHeader, Breadcrumb, Tabs, Accordion, Disclosure, List, DescriptionList, Blockquote, Chip, PageNavigation, StepNavigation, ProgressIndicator, SearchBox
P2: Skeleton, Table (DataTable), ScrollTopButton, UtilityLink, HamburgerMenuButton, Drawer, FileUpload, TableOfContents, ResourceList, Image, HorizontalMenu, MenuList, BottomNavigation, MobileMenu

## Token Rules (MANDATORY for AI)

- Use semantic tokens ONLY: color.surface.primary, color.action.primary, etc.
- NO raw hex or px in generated code
- primitives.json is shipped for builds; AI must NOT read or copy its values
- Docs site shows semantic / component tokens only (not primitive scales)
- Reference: design-tokens/semantic.*.json, design-tokens/components.json

## Build & Harness

npm run check          # G0-G3 + docs contract + isotc (L1 loop)
npm run check:fast     # skip G3; keep docs contract
npm run check:docs     # links + canonical/public surface parity
npm run check:g4       # Chromatic (needs CHROMATIC_PROJECT_TOKEN; L2/CI)
npm run test:stories   # G3 only
npm run storybook:check # G3 + static Storybook build
npm run docs:check     # docs contract + static Docs site build
npm run docs:dev       # Astro docs site

Gates: G0 tokens | G1 no-raw | G2 tsc | G3 storybook+a11y | docs contract | G4 Chromatic (CI) | isotc
G5: consumer-repo Lighthouse (not in this repo)

Output: dist/{brand}/{mode}/tokens.css, dist/slt-tokens.css, dist-ui/

## Themes

data-theme: ai-dash | sound-laboratory | slt-corporate | admin
data-color-mode: light | dark (default: dark for products, light for admin)

## Brands

- AI-DASH (B2B): logical, navy+gold, dark-first
- Sound Laboratory (B2C): warm, coral+gold (coral placeholder — see ADR-001)

## Constraints

- No --spacing-* in @theme (Tailwind v4 collision)
- danger buttons must pair with cancel
- 44px min tap targets, focus rings required
- Motion craft: docs/L1-foundations/motion-craft.md (map to --motion-*; source docs/reference/emilkowalski-skills/)


## Docs

Full index: docs/README.md
Motion craft: docs/L1-foundations/motion-craft.md


Roadmap: docs/ROADMAP.md
Changelog: CHANGELOG.md
Adoption: templates/consumer-g5/
